caption: The video appears to be set in a professional or educational environment, likely during a simulation week as indicated by the text "Sim Week" and "Day 4" on the screen. Two individuals are seated at a table, engaged in a conversation. The person on the left, with long dark hair, is gesturing with their hands clasped together, possibly explaining or discussing something. The person on the right, wearing a blue scrub top and a face mask, listens attentively, nodding slightly. The setting includes office chairs and a framed picture on the wall, suggesting an indoor, formal space. The overall atmosphere seems focused and collaborative, typical of a training or learning session.
